verdict: A powerhouse budget serum with clinically-proven niacinamide for pore refinement and sebum control, plus zinc for skin-clarifying benefits. Exceptional value with minimal ingredient list and proven efficacy across 8,500+ reviews.

_research.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
pros: High-concentration niacinamide with robust clinical backing
Zinc inclusion targets breakout-prone skin effectively
_research.con: Can cause slight dryness or purging in sensitive skin during initial use.
